acceptance_targets: [PRS-002] PASS if the revised cited spans reduce "old + noun" labels to no more than two total and the temptation cluster at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:215 plus snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:217 uses at least two different sentence openings. FAIL if the same formulaic labels/openers still dominate those beats.

[PRS-003] PASS if at least three non-hinge timestamp beats in the cited spans are replaced by embodied progression markers while chronology remains clear on first read. FAIL if the revised chapter still relies on frequent clock stamps to carry emotional escalation.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised cited spans reduce "old + noun" labels to no more than two total and the temptation cluster at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:215 plus snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:217 uses at least two different sentence openings. FAIL if the same formulaic labels/openers still dominate those beats.
findings.problem: Recurring constructions flatten texture: repeated "old + noun" labeling (old spark/script/answer/Ravi/plan/hunger/bargaining/freedom) and repeated "She pictured..." openings stack as formula rather than discovery.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the cited lines so at least half of these repeats are replaced with scene-specific perception or action. Prioritize snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:199, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:305, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:377, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:215, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:217. Keep one recurrence where intentional, diversify the rest.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if at least three non-hinge timestamp beats in the cited spans are replaced by embodied progression markers while chronology remains clear on first read. FAIL if the revised chapter still relies on frequent clock stamps to carry emotional escalation.
findings.problem: Anika's counting/logistics stress tell is over-literalized through repeated timestamping and minute marks, which starts to feel mechanically imported from the style-bible profile rather than organically varying prose rhythm.
findings.rewrite_direction: Keep only hinge timestamps (e.g., warning/end points) and convert several other time mentions at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:15, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:93, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:97, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:341, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:484, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_18.md:490 into sensory or behavioral progression cues.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Focus on prose and copyedit finish: diction precision, rhythm control, sentence-level clarity, grammar, line-level polish without flattening style, and explicit aesthetic-risk audit (sanitization is the primary risk — do not soften or euphemize; push toward creative risk and specificity).
revision_pass.label: prose/copyedit fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into uncomfortable specificity when it changes behavior: pain detail, debt arithmetic, manipulative care, and mixed motives. In edge cases, prefer the truest in-character action over protective narration, then carry the real consequence forward instead of immediately moralizing it away.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If coercion, grief, injury, or economic shame appears, language must stay specific and embodied; vague softening triggers mandatory rewrite.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High - contractions are the spoken default; uncontracted forms are reserved for formal authority, deliberate emphasis, or emotional freezing.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Vary scene count and dialogue density chapter to chapter: rotate match compression, slow inventory aftermath, institutional pressure scenes, and quiet domestic intervals so adjacent chapters do not share the same structural pulse.
prose_style_profile.diction: Concrete contemporary diction with class-aware specificity; avoid abstract therapy language unless a character would actually use it.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third anchored in Anika for most chapters, with brief controlled slips toward Ravi in designated confrontation and aftermath chapters.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate clipped athletic sequences with longer reflective cadences; sentence length should track exertion, shame, and release.
